EX 12 – Full Case Picking Changes Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u EX12 Configurations PAGEREF _Toc45806635 \h 3 1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX12 Extension Control PAGEREF _Toc45806636 \h 3 1.1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension PAGEREF _Toc45806637 \h 3 1.1.2 Add C-000-EX12 Global Extension PAGEREF _Toc45806638 \h 5 1.2 Add Pck Cubed Dir Bytes 502-502 and 507-507 PAGEREF _Toc45806639 \h 6 1.2.1 Pck Cubed Dir 502-502 and 507-507 PAGEREF _Toc45806640 \h 6 EX 12 Task Level Printing Configuration Follow below steps to configure Task Level Printing Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX12 Extension Control Add C-000-000 Global Extension Open System Codes UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-000 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add C-000-EX12 Global Extension Remain in System Codes UI “Code ID” section Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-EX12 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add Pck Cubed Dir Bytes 502-502 and 507-507 Pck Cubed Dir 502-502 and 507-507 Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Pck Cubed Dir” Click on “Parameters” Tab Select Program Template and then select “Add” Input the below information and hit “Save” Select “Add” again Input the below information and hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” again Go to Byte 502-502 and check the Y/N flag Go to Byte 507-507 and check the Y/N flag x Hit “Save”

[Document: MCLN EX12 Full Case Picking Changes Configuration Guide]

EX 12 – Full Case Picking Changes Contents  EX12 Configurations  1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX12 Extension Control  1.1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension  1.1.2 Add C-000-EX12 Global Extension  1.2 Add Pck Cubed Dir Bytes 502-502 and 507-507  1.2.1 Pck Cubed Dir 502-502 and 507-507  EX 12 Task Level Printing Configuration Follow below steps to configure Task Level Printing Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX12 Extension Control Add C-000-000 Global Extension Open System Codes UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-000 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add C-000-EX12 Global Extension Remain in System Codes UI “Code ID” section Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-EX12 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add Pck Cubed Dir Bytes 502-502 and 507-507 Pck Cubed Dir 502-502 and 507-507 Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Pck Cubed Dir” Click on “Parameters” Tab Select Program Template and then select “Add” Input the below information and hit “Save” Select “Add” again Input the below information and hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” again Go to Byte 502-502 and check the Y/N flag Go to Byte 507-507 and check the Y/N flag x Hit “Save”
